name: Max Doors 20k Investor
description: Early TORIUM investor profile focused on maximizing the number of small sellable units created through fractioning.
notes: This profile is intentionally simple and assumption-based.
The 20k cost is treated as the investor-specific cost for creating each additional unit, including light bureaucracy/split-related costs.
Purchase-side costs are estimated separately through purchase_cost_rate and must be calibrated with real deals later.
